items.name: Pipe Pressure Drop
items.summary: Composes Reynolds + friction model + Darcy-Weisbach for pipe pressure loss.

items.name: Isentropic Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve any supported isentropic input to any supported output through Mach pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: Mach, MachAngle, Prandtl-Meyer angle, p/p0, T/T0, rho/rho0, A/A*

items.name: Normal Shock Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve normal-shock input kinds to target kinds through deterministic M1 pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: M1, M2, p2/p1, rho2/rho1, T2/T1, p02/p01
Target kinds: M1, M2, p2/p1, rho2/rho1, T2/T1, p02/p01

items.name: Nozzle Flow Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style quasi-1D nozzle device: solve isentropic nozzle input kinds to target kinds through Mach pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: Mach, A/A*, p/p0, T/T0, rho/rho0
Optional stagnation-reference scaling for static p/T/rho outputs

items.name: Oblique Shock Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve oblique-shock input pairs (M1+beta / M1+theta) to target outputs with explicit weak/strong branch handling.

items.name: Fanno Flow Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve Fanno star-reference input kinds to target kinds through Mach pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: Mach, T/T*, p/p*, rho/rho*, p0/p0*, 4fL*/D

items.name: Rayleigh Flow Calculator
items.summary: Calculator-style compressible device: solve Rayleigh star-reference input kinds to target kinds through Mach pivot orchestration.
supported_modes: Input kinds: Mach, T/T*, p/p*, rho/rho*, T0/T0*, p0/p0*, V/V*
Branch-aware inversion for selected ratio -> Mach paths
